portal.title: Return or exchange
portal.subtitle: You can return products within 30 days of receipt. Returns within the EU are free.
portal.loginCta: Log in to view my order

guest.title: Look up your order
guest.subtitle: Enter your order number and email address to find your order.
guest.notFoundMessage: No order found. Please check your details.
guest.rateLimitMessage: Too many attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
guest.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

items.title: Which items do you want to return?
items.subtitle: Select the items you want to return and specify the quantity.
items.noItemsError: Select at least one item to continue.
items.finalSaleBlocker: Final sale. This item cannot be returned.
items.windowExpiredBlocker: The 30-day return window for this item has expired.
items.alreadyReturnedBlocker: This item has already been returned.

reason.title: What is your reason for returning?
reason.subtitle: For each item, indicate why you want to return it.
reason.selectReasonError: Please select a reason to continue.

resolution.title: How would you like to resolve this?
resolution.subtitle: Choose the resolution that works for you.
resolution.opsReviewTitle: Our customer service will contact you
resolution.opsReviewText: Due to the nature of your return, our customer service will review your request. You will hear from us within 2 business days.

refund.title: Refund
refund.description: Refunded to your original payment method.

exchange.title: Exchange
exchange.description: Exchange the item for a different size or colour.

store_credit.title: Store credit
store_credit.description: Receive 5% extra as store credit. Available immediately in your wallet.

method.title: How will you ship your package?
method.subtitle: Choose your return method.

qr.title: DHL drop-off point. QR code
qr.description: Paperless. Scan the QR code at a DHL drop-off point. No printer needed.

label.title: Print your own label
label.description: We will send a PDF label to your email address. Print it out and attach it to the package.

confirm.title: Review your return
confirm.subtitle: Check the details before submitting your return.
confirm.termsRequiredError: Please accept the return policy to continue.
confirm.estimatedTimeline: Label within 1 hour by email. Refund within 5-7 business days after receipt.

success.title: Return submitted
success.subtitle: Your return request has been successfully submitted.
nextSteps: You will receive a confirmation email at your email address.
Your label or QR code will be sent within 1 hour by email.
Pack the items securely in the original packaging.
Drop off the package at a DHL drop-off point or hand it to the courier.
We will process your return within 5 business days of receipt.

status.title: Return status
status.subtitle: View the current status and history of your return request.

trust.title: Why return with JANICE
signals: 30-day return window from the date of receipt.
Secure payment via Mollie. Refunded to your original payment method.
Personal customer service via email and chat.
Returned items are reused or recycled.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have access to this page.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please look up your order again.
